Subject: RE: Pilot Project: Employee Data Format
Importance: High

Hi team,
Hope all is well.

Reference to the phone call we had,
We need to ensure that our employees' responses are completely anonymized, making it impossible to link any employee to their answer sheet. While we trust your policy of not sharing this information, PDPL laws require us to inform our employees if we simply gather this data. The concern is that most people won't respond honestly if they know we collect emails or names. Therefore, we request the following:

- Do not collect any names from Wataniya.
- Send the survey only to the full list of emails provided.
- Do not link any survey response to an employee's email. This means not tagging it internally either. We want neither you nor Wataniya to know which email corresponds to which response.
- Delete the list of emails from your outbox and email system after use.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
FAISAL

ALALSHI

properties.hs_meeting_body:
Had a meeting with David , Tried to gave him a full demo but he's in hurry as he needs to jum to another meeting in 30 min max

The company size : 500 and they're expanding

They made a manual survey before , no external tool and they found the challenge in analysis and the results after surveys

Overview and heatmap only covered in the demo , and he apologized for not able to continue the meeting

Agreed with david to have another meeting and he will call shahinaz to arrange the most suitable time

Omantel was highly successful and presents a great opportunity for us. They are actively seeking new vendors to replace Qualtrics, which they are currently using.
With 3,000 employees, their main pain points with Qualtrics are the high costs for customization and adding new segments. They expressed a strong need for more flexibility and were very interested in our platform's ability to support multiple languages.
As a next step, we will be sending them our technical proposal. After they review it, they will issue an RFP for our financial proposal.
He was looking at the company profile and suggested having a meeting.
She is very interested. The call was perfect. She said they are interested in knowing more about the platform as they are implementing new tools.

We met Ahmed Omar and me and gave him a full brief, and explained to him our new features.

They have 600 employees in 16 countries, but they want to start to survey 225 of UAE's employees first.
The meeting Postponed to next Sunday because of network today in Egypt unstable

I just finished the meeting with Yasmine Moussa (Human Resources Consultant) in the Egypt office.

Enova has a physical presence all over the MENA region with offices in UAE, KSA, Bahrain, Oman, Qatar, Egypt, Lebanon, and Turkey. (HQ in Dubai)

They have a Manpower plan that extends all the way to the end of 2024 with the objective of attaining a workforce of 1,000 employees in Egypt with 80% of them being blue-collar.

They are required to dispatch a survey in both January 2024 and July 2024.

Yasmine was impressed by the platform and is eager to showcase it to the headquarters in Dubai. She will be coordinating with me to schedule a second demo meeting in Dubai, as we explore the potential of expanding our platform to other countries.

I will follow up with her after one week.

Maher joined me in this meeting.

I met Riham Talaat and Nada from her team, I gave them a full demo.

Riham asked me if we have any clients in the real estate.

I explained to her our new updates (experience module, exporting reports, and benchmark).

Their plan was to dispatch surveys next June, but when she saw the new updates they want to dispatch pulse surveys in this Dec.

They have Oracle HRIS.

Their headcount is now 200 employees.

Riham requested an updated price quote and she will get back to me to give me the feedback next week.

I met Seteve Jimmy the HR Manager, this meeting was 2nd meeting.

I met before

Abdulrahman Sagheir HR Employee Engagement Specialist, doesn't wanna share the headcount.

They hired someone "Head Of OD & Talent" he will be responsible to the surveys.

They have 4K employees 2.5K Blue Collars will need to send SMS Link to them.

They are using Odoo HRIS.

Steve will discuss our platform and price quote with the HR Director Mr. Hassan Kahar and he will get back to me with the price quote next week.

After that we will arrange 3rd meeting with the new employee "Head Of OD & Talent"

I met Waad and gave her a full brief about our company.

They have 130 employees 60 employees need SMS.

They have Microsoft Dynamics HRIS.

They did internal surveys in-house before.

She told me that we have a very good reporting system.

She requested to send her a presentation and financial proposal.

She told me that depends on the cost the we take the decision to use us this year or after October when they will put the new budget for 2024.

I will follow up with her after 1 week.

- Introduced Fawaz to Alya.
- They are busy with rebranding and creating a company vision and mission.
- He stressed the importance of employees' privacy due to the trust issue by their employees.
- Links via SMS will be required as they have blue-collar employees.
- He requested to know the pricing model, which will be taken care of by Alya.
- I connected them together by email.

I mat Emad management (HR Manager)

He joined from his phone.

I gave him a full brief about our platform.

They have 750 employees (200 employees only have e-mails) and 550 blue collars need (4,950 SMS).

They are using ERP System "https://www.olivoerp.com/"

They have 3 locations in KSA (Jeddah . Riyadh & Dammam).

He wanted to know the price and asked me 3 times during the meeting (I said it will cost you Emad (SAR 33,750) = $9,000 per year he said ok I want a proposal.

He told me that he will get back to me after Eid.

We agreed to send him our presentation to present it to the management then after Eid, we will arrange 2nd meeting to discuss the technical and financial part.

- Met with Dr. Mervat, Ayman, Mostafa (HR Manager), and Mohammad Feky.
- Discussed the roadmap.
- They will check with IT regarding the possibility of integrating with Hits HRIS and will let us know next week.

- The desired launch date is before Ramadan.

NEXT STEPS
- 5/2: Ayman is to check with IT regarding the possibility of integrating with Hits HRIS and will let us know next week.
- 2/3: Eyad is to send the employee data template.
- 2/3 Eyad is to send the questions so they chose what questions they would like to include (English, Arabic, and Slang).
- 5/2: Ayman is to send a few time slots for another meeting so we discuss the remaining steps (training and announcement).

Me and Eyad met Marina

Eyad explained to her the Benchmark part in (Asia & Europe)

Eyad told her about the updated recommendation action plan part.

Also we told her about the experience module again.

She told us that Mr. Walid wants to make sure that we have all there features that's why she sent us all the questions.

She told us that they have the budget meeting this week and she will get back to us next week with the final approval and signed agreement

- Training
- 46 employees.
- They will start vacation next week.
- They believe that the platform will help them make improvements.

- Noora joined last month.

NEXT STEPS

- Send the presentation.
- Send quotation.
- They will share their feedback at the end of the month.

MAIN POINTS
- He is aware that attracting talents is key nowadays.
- He believes that HR is a partner of all departments.
- They run engagement surveys and arrange training.
- The group is active in many verticles, including Medical supplies, IT services (hardware and software) working with Aramco mainly, and Real Estate (in the GCC).
- 1,100 (including 40 in other countries, and 350 blue-collar employees), will consider around 700 employees.
- Oracle HR system.
- In-house surveys, The main issues were:
a) Determining the topics.
b) Tailoring the surveys.
c) Participation issues due to privacy concerns.
d) The analysis was really hard.
- The major challenges are :
1. Attracting talents.
2. Turnover.
3. Employee satisfaction.
- Liked the level of detail, action plan, exit analysis, and question.
- The price is a bit high, and they are looking at several options.
- He will be on leave from tomorrow but will share his decision next week.
- The CHRO is the decision maker.
- They want to have a platform this year.

- They will be comparing the cost of building software in-house to buying software.

NEXT STEPS
- Abdulaziz will share his feedback next week.
- I will follow up in the following week.

MAIN POINTS
- Faisal led transformation initiatives in the past, including employee engagement.
- One of their objectives now is to develop plans and strategies.
-In-house HRIS.
-2,000 in all KSA.
- Very interested in the engagement area.
- He has knowledge about the engagement.

- A very nice person.

NEXT STEPS
- Send documents and a quote.
- If all is good, Faisal will arrange a second meeting with the top management.
- Follow up in two weeks.
- Arrange an in-person visit for the next meeting.

Me & Eyda met Saraha , Nada & Dr. George Sedki i gave him full brief and demo , Eyad talked about benchmark , and we started to check their challenges

Dr. George asked about some requirements :

1- Oracle EBS Integration.
2- The NDA ( if we have GDB in UK or we are subject to the intellectual property rights law of the Egyptian law.
3- Prepare separate prices and send it by e-mail one year and two years agreement
4- Options for 1st year pulse surveys and 2nd year full fledge survey

I met Samaa ater meeting Ihab Mamdouh in the 1st online meeting , ihab left fatura and hand over our prospecting to Fatura and loop Samaa in an e-mail , i followed up with her and arranged our 2nd meeting , i showed her our platform and she said that their need now to bring performance system for app , this is tejir 1st praiority before end of this year, she said we can about this subject next year and check with the managment to consider it in our new budget for 2032 , i told her that we can finaliose everthinhg in Q4 and start the subsripipn next year she said tyheir only pain that their employee will not respond the survey that why she asked me technical question because we offered them SMS campaign to 50% of 600 employees so we will send them the link on their mobile numbers

her question was she needs to know how many times we are sending reminders after send the employee 1st time and how can we follow up on response to be in a good level of engagement and she wants also to send her our brochure , she requested to send her the answer on her technical question by e-mail and we agreed to follow up after 2 weeks

شكرًا لكم على التواصل والاهتمام،

يسعدني ترتيب الاجتماع والتعرف أكثر على Engagesoft واستكشاف كيف يمكن أن تسهم في دعم احتياجاتنا، خاصة في مجال تحليل البيانات وتعزيز الثقافة المؤسسية.

Who are we meeting with?

Mohammed Belkhayatte

Chief Transformation Officer

Accurate Headcount:

1300

Current Situation
they are connections: high ternover.
he will add relevant departments manager

We met Bachir and Jude from their HQ in Dubai.

Omar explained our platform and showed them a full demo.

They are in 7 countries.

They have 6,000 employees (80% Blue Collars).

They need to add Urdu.

They have Adrenalin HRIS.

They need to dispatch the survey in Dec. Maximum Jan.

Yasmine mentioned that we may meet the VP of HR Mr. Assem for a final meeting (HQ/Dubai).

They have a big event called the Cup 18 and they need us to follow up with them after the middle of Dec.

I met Mark and I gave him a full brief about our platform.

He told me that Tamer Abou Zahra left the company the one I met twice before.

after half an hour he told me that he needed to attend an urgent meeting with the CEO and he requested to call him tomorrow morning to reschedule another meeting

I met Radwa.

I gave her a full brief about our company I showed her the dashboard and explained everything.

They have Indian HRIS and they will implement it next year with SAP.

I met with Marwan Hamdy, HR Capital Business Partner, to discuss their company's survey needs.

Key Points

Company Size and Structure: The company has 400 employees and is a group of companies with a central HR team in addition to individual HR teams for each company.

Current Survey Practices:

They currently conduct quarterly employee engagement surveys.

They also do other surveys, such as post-training surveys.

Surveys for blue-collar employees are manual, which makes analysis time-consuming.

Upcoming Needs and Opportunities:

They need to send out a training survey next month.

They are considering a platform solution for their surveys, but this is contingent on price, as top management has not yet committed to this approach.

Next Steps and Offer:

I offered them a special discount valid until September 10, 2025.

The contract can be signed anytime until January 2026, with payment finalized by the end of 2025.

We agreed that I will send him a presentation outlining a one-year and a six-month package covering both engagement and experience surveys.

Contact:

Reshmi, Employee Relations and Retention Manager at Seazon Group.

Company Overview:

Seazon Group is a Food & Beverage group.

HQ Location: Kuwait.

Other Offices: GCC countries (KSA, Oman, Bahrain, Qatar, UAE).

HR Structure: HR is centralized from Kuwait HQ.

Employee Count: 1,600 employees.

Blue-Collar Workforce: 30% of employees are in operations and do not have business email access.

Current Situation (Tooling & Practices):

Conduct engagement surveys twice a year using "Microsoft Dynamics 365."

Also conduct onboarding and exit surveys.

Want to implement specific surveys for the managerial level.

Core Challenges (Pain Points):

Their main challenge is not having one centralized platform for all surveys.

Areas of Interest (Engagesoft):

Reshmi was very impressed with the AI action plan recommendations.

She inquired about sending surveys to operations employees via SMS.

She also considered using their personal emails for survey distribution to operations staff.

Next Steps:

Reshmi requested a technical and financial proposal.

She asked for a follow-up next week.

Certainly! Here's a more detailed and polished version of your message:

I met with Dr. Ahmed Waheed, the Chief Human Resources Officer (CHRO), along with Marina and Shaimaa from the HR team.

During our meeting, I provided Dr. Ahmed with a comprehensive overview of our organization and capabilities.

We discussed their current employee engagement tools. He mentioned that their IT department has implemented an internal solution using Google Forms. However, he expressed that they are seeking an experienced third-party provider to conduct engagement surveys. I informed him that we had previously held two meetings—one with Ashraf and another with a different team member—and that he was quite upset that he was not informed about our solution earlier.

Dr. Ahmed highlighted their pain points, including low participation rates in their current surveys, and their need for more advanced reporting, benchmarking, and actionable recommendations. He also shared that they are currently running onboarding and exit surveys.

Upon reviewing our pricing, he noted that our rates are competitive compared to other vendors he has seen. He mentioned that they plan to initiate this survey at the beginning of Q4 and that their workforce comprises approximately 2,800 employees in Cairo and Alexandria.

We agreed to send him a detailed technical and financial proposal for our engagement solutions and survey services. He will be traveling to Morocco and Dubai, and once he returns, Shaimaa will contact me to schedule a follow-up meeting.

properties.hs_meeting_body:
Meeting with Mogo's HR

Our team met with Ahmed from Mogo, a company with 70 employees, to discuss their upcoming employee engagement survey. They plan to conduct the survey in January 2026 and are looking for a solution that can integrate with their existing Odoo HRIS. We discussed how our platform can automate various survey types—including onboarding, benefits, and exit interviews—and shared that survey links can be distributed through email, SMS, and QR codes.

Option 2: Detailed and Structured

This option breaks down the key information with headings, making it easy to scan and digest.

Meeting Brief: Mogo HR
Attendees: Ahmed (Mogo), [Your Name]
Date: [Date of meeting]

Company: Mogo (approximately 70 employees)

Summary

Mogo's HR team is preparing for their annual employee engagement survey in January 2026. They are looking for a survey solution that can integrate with their Odoo HRIS to automate the process.

Key Discussion Points

Employee Survey Needs: Mogo is planning an annual employee engagement survey but is also interested in a platform that supports other survey types, such as benefits (e.g., loans), onboarding, and exit interviews.

Integration: We highlighted our platform’s ability to integrate with Odoo HRIS to streamline the survey process and automate data collection.

Survey Distribution: Our platform offers multiple distribution channels for surveys, including email, SMS, generic links, and QR codes.

Next Steps

Provide a platform demo focused on Odoo integration and survey automation.

Follow up with a detailed proposal outlining the relevant features and pricing.

I met with Menna, the HR Supervisor at Fawry, to discuss their current survey practices. She explained that they are using Google Forms to run various HR surveys, including those for employee engagement, benefits, onboarding, exit, and medical feedback.

Menna initially expressed skepticism, asking why they would need a platform like EngageSoft if they could perform analysis and use AI on their own data. This perspective changed significantly when I showed her the EngageSoft dashboard. She immediately saw the difference, stating that it answered her question and highlighted the clear distinction between their current process and our platform's capabilities.

Fawry has a large workforce of 8,000 employees across six different companies. Following the demo, Menna asked me to send a technical and financial proposal specifically for our engagement and experience solutions. We have scheduled a follow-up for next Wednesday.

A quick platform demonstration.

Meeting Brief: Engagesoft and Ezdan Holding Group

Ezdan Holding Group:

Mahmoud Embaby, Section Head - Talent Management

Maryam Salameh, HR Coordinator

Engagesoft:

[Your Name], [Your Title]

Date: [Date of Meeting]

Meeting Summary

This meeting with the Ezdan Holding Group HR team served to discuss their employee experience and talent management initiatives. We covered the following key points:

Employee Base: Ezdan Holding Group employs approximately 2,000 staff across its real estate, hospitality, and mall sectors.

Upcoming Survey: The HR team is planning to launch its annual employee satisfaction survey in December 2025.

Engagesoft Capabilities: We highlighted how our platform can support their goals by:

Providing comprehensive reporting at both the group level and for each individual sector.

Facilitating various employee experience surveys (e.g., onboarding, exit, and other key touchpoints).

Offering multi-language survey support to accommodate their diverse workforce.

Supporting an Employee Value Proposition (EVP) analysis to identify and address any gaps.

Key Differentiators: We also showcased our AI-driven action plan recommendations and the ability to integrate our platform with Microsoft Teams.

Agreements and Next Steps

Based on our discussion, we have agreed on the following terms:

Discounted Proposal: A 35% discount will be applied to the financial proposal for both the up to 2,000 employee tier and the up to 600 employee tier.

Subscription Flexibility: The subscription start date is flexible until January 2026. Finalization of the service level agreement (SLA) and payment will be due in Q4 2025.

Action Required: To secure this special offer, Ezdan Holding Group must provide initial approval and a signed copy of the attached proposal by the end of August 2025.

I met with Menna Metwally, the People Experience & Culture Transformation Lead at Ahram Security Group. She joined the company four months ago and previously worked at Mountain View, where she was already familiar with our services.

The primary challenge they face is conducting effective employee engagement surveys for their blue-collar workforce. Of their 1,200 employees, 1,000 are blue-collar staff located across three different sites. Currently, their HR Director, Dr. Marwan Ali, is using Gallup questions on Microsoft Forms, with the next survey planned for October 1st.

I presented a solution that included a significant 35% discount on our services, with flexible payment terms allowing them to pay as late as December 2025. Menna confirmed that their budget will be finalized in October, which aligns well with our offer.

Agreed Next Steps

I will send an email to Menna detailing the discount offer.

I will cc the following individuals on the email: Dr. Marwan Ali (HR Director), along with Amany and Nourhan Ahmed from the procurement team.

We will follow up with each other next week to discuss their decision.

We met Mariez, Farha, Shereen, and Abdulghany Barakat.

They previously used SurveyMonkey for their surveys and expressed the need to maintain their historical trend data by uploading their previous survey results onto our dashboard. This is a critical requirement for them.

I met Mohamed Samir Eissa, Deputy Head of HR/Head of Talent & Organizational Development and Culture Transformation.

We discussed several key areas where our platform, Engagesoft, can support Credit Agricole's HR initiatives.

Comprehensive Employee Experience: We explored how our platform can measure the complete employee journey, from onboarding and performance appraisals to post-training and exit surveys. This approach provides a holistic view of the employee experience.

Targeted Insights with Heatmap Analysis: Our platform’s heatmap analysis can visualize survey results across various demographics, such as department, branch, age, and tenure. This will allow your team to easily identify and focus on the most impactful activities for specific groups.

AI-Powered Action Plans: The Engagesoft AI Action Plan Recommendation Tool can help your team generate effective action plans for areas with low scores, streamlining the process of addressing key issues.

Extensive Survey Library: We offer a wide range of surveys, including those for employee engagement, experience, and organizational health. This library includes specific assessments for Diversity & Inclusion, Mental Health, Psychological Safety, and Employee Wellbeing, which you mentioned as a key area of interest.

Seamless HRIS Integration: Our platform can integrate with your existing Oracle Fusion HRIS module to automate survey deployment and data management.

Central Bank of Egypt Compliance: I confirmed that our agreement with Al Ahli Bank of Kuwait demonstrates our successful compliance with all Central Bank of Egypt restrictions and requirements.

Survey Integration and Tendering: We understand that employee engagement surveys are currently managed by Credit Agricole HQ. We can present our solution through the official Credit Agricole tendering process to integrate our employee experience platform.

Next Steps and Proposal
As we agreed, I will follow up with you in early October after you've had a chance to discuss these points with the CHRO, Marie-Therese Nagui.

ontact: Amr Elbagoury, HR Manager

Summary of Discussion:

I met with Amr Elbagoury, the HR Manager, to discuss their employee engagement survey process. The company has approximately 470 employees, with about 250 of them being blue-collar workers.

Their current process uses Google Forms, which is proving to be a challenge. It's time-consuming for Amr to manually analyze the results, and he faces a significant hurdle with the blue-collar workforce, for whom they must conduct the survey manually.

Amr has several specific requirements for a new solution:

He needs to be able to view results filtered by manager and was very interested in our organizational chart analysis feature.

He wants a way to filter and analyze comments, and our comments analysis feature was well-received.

A key feature for their blue-collar employees is voice-over for the survey questions, as some of them are not literate.

They plan to conduct their next survey in September or October.

Next Steps:

We have agreed to offer them our August offer.

I will send the proposal to Amr today, as the CEO is traveling tomorrow.

Amr will discuss the proposal with the CEO and get back to us before August 31st.

Certainly! Here's a polished and well-structured version of your meeting brief:

I met with Mariam Salah and Nourhan Farid from the Talent Management Team.

Mariam informed me that their organization has 500 employees and conducts engagement surveys annually in November through an American company called "CustomInsight," with whom they have been working since 2017.

They currently have an in-house solution for the employee experience but rely on CustomInsight solely for engagement surveys. They are exploring other vendor options due to some challenges with their current provider, including limited insights—only providing overall engagement data and data segmented by managers. They manually handle action plans and lack local benchmarks, which they consider crucial for their analysis.

They expressed strong interest in the action plan task management feature, praising its effectiveness and the flexibility it offers in customizing questions. They also appreciated that the platform allows for an unlimited number of surveys. I recommended that they consider running pulse surveys after implementing action plans, which they also found appealing.

Additionally, they mentioned a preference for working with foreign companies rather than local Egyptian providers.

They also requested if it would be possible to upload their previous survey responses onto our dashboard to maintain their internal benchmarks and track trends over time. This would enable them to compare new survey results with previous years.

We agreed to send them our technical and financial proposals, including a sample of our questions. A follow-up offline meeting will be scheduled with the HR Director to present our platform in detail.

Please note, they are currently using HITS HRIS.

properties.hs_meeting_body:
This meeting comes as part of our follow-up efforts to connect with Ms. Sally Saad, HR Director. I had previously contacted her to request a meeting at her office. In response, she asked whom I had already met with and when. After I shared the details, she assumed that a proposal had already been presented, and mentioned that she wasn’t initially to collbratee with just only surveys they can do it . However, she expressed, noting that it might be possible to implement such solutions internally.

I explained that the platform has been enhanced with new features, including the AI Action Plan and the Employee Experience module, which add significant value.

Ms. Sally recommended that I speak with Ms. Nouran and assured me she would ensure Nouran follows up with me, even if the final decision is not in our favor.

I then contacted Ms. Nouran to follow up. She remembered our previous interaction and mentioned that Ms. Sally still believes this type of initiative could be done internally without external support. I walked her through the new features again, and she showed interest in continuing the conversation. She proposed including Mr. Mena Kamal in the meeting, as he is closer to Ms. Sally and may help move things forward.

We also agreed to record the meeting so that Ms. Sally can review it and gain a clearer understanding of the proposal.

he is interested

ants to learn more about our platform
hey have built their own system, to measure the engagement and the Exit interview

Company Overview:

BasharSoft is the holding company for Wuzzuf and Forasna.

They currently have 150 employees and expect to reach 180 by year-end.

Current Survey Practices:

They run engagement surveys every 6 months using Google Forms.

They currently use Zen HR but plan to discontinue their service.

Client Feedback & Next Steps:

Aya was impressed with our platform.

She mentioned she's also meeting with another engagement survey company, but she's confident they are not as professional as us.

We agreed to send her the technical and financial proposal by tomorrow.

She will provide her feedback by the end of this Wednesday.

Company Overview:

They have up to 5,000 employees.

They also have a development company called "The MARQ Communities" with up to 250 employees.

Current Survey Practices:

They conduct two surveys annually: an engagement survey and a happiness survey.

These surveys are currently done using Google Forms.

They use Odoo HRIS.

Client Feedback & Areas of Interest in Our Platform:

They really liked our platform's analysis capabilities and the easy way to gain insights based on demographics.

They are also planning to run onboarding and exit surveys.

Upcoming Survey & Next Steps:

Their next survey is planned for December 2025.

They requested a technical and financial proposal, along with a sample of our detailed report, our company profile, and our engagement model.

I met Mina George, Kasrawy Group's People & Culture Section Head, to discuss their employee surveys.

Mina provided a comprehensive overview of their current process:

Kasrawu Group conducts an annual OHS (Occupational Health and Safety) survey every December, before the performance appraisal period.

They have 1,300 employees, with 45% being blue-collar workers.

Currently, they use Microdot forms and the Hits HRIS system to conduct these surveys.

I demonstrated how our platform's engagement model could streamline their OHS surveys. We also discussed various solutions for effectively reaching their blue-collar employees.

We've agreed that I will send him a financial proposal. He will review it with management, and I will follow up with him early next week

they are financial service company under Ekh Egypt Kuwait Holding, they have a high turnover rate issue. I gave her a context about exit surveys, she checked our presentation interested to know more
she was preparing a survey manually and sent it to management to get confirmation on

Attendees:

Shaimaa Youssef, Culture Transformation Manager

Mehar Korayem, Culture Transformation Specialist

[Your Name]

Maryam Farrag (Unable to attend due to a conflicting meeting)

Key Discussion Points

Initial Misconception: The team's initial understanding was that we provide engagement activities.

Our Value Proposition: I refocused the conversation to our employee experience product. We highlighted how our solution can provide accurate, pre-activity feedback to help them budget for and design effective employee engagement initiatives. This would ensure their activities align with actual employee needs.

Positive Reception: Shaimaa and Mehar were very interested in this approach. They also recognized the value of using our solution to gather post-event feedback to measure the impact of their initiatives.

Scale and Systems: They have a total of 22,000 employees and use both Oracle HRIS and SAP.

properties.hs_meeting_body:
Meeting Brief: QNB Group

Attendees:

Emad, Assistant Vice President, L&D Technology

Meeting Purpose:

To explore how Engagesoft’s Engagement Model and Dashboard can provide actionable insights, detailed reporting, and strategic recommendations to support QNB Group’s employee engagement initiatives.

Discussion Highlights

QNB Group Overview: QNB Group has a large employee base of approximately 3,500 employees in their Qatar headquarters and over 25,000 in international offices.

Historical Data Migration: We confirmed the ability to migrate all of QNB's historical survey data from their previous vendor to our platform. This will provide a valuable benchmark for future reports and analysis.

Customized Surveying: The Engagesoft platform allows for tailored survey questions aligned with QNB Group’s culture, which will make it easier for all employees to participate.

Key Interest Areas: Emad expressed particular interest in our Performance vs. Engagement Correlation feature, which reveals the factors influencing both high and low performance across teams.

Flexibility and Scale: Our unlimited survey capacity enables the HR team to conduct pulse surveys following each action plan. The action plan task management feature consolidates all follow-up actions, simplifying tracking and accountability.

Regional Presence and Security: We confirmed that Engagesoft has headquarters in Jordan and legal entities in Egypt and Saudi Arabia. Our compliance with central bank security requirements in these countries has been verified through our agreements with clients like Al Ahli Bank of Kuwait (Egypt), The Saudi Investment Bank, and Al Rajhi Takaful (KSA).

Key Features for Vendor Comparison

As requested by Emad, a separate list of key features for vendor comparison will be provided.

Next Steps

Second Meeting: We will schedule a second meeting with the other HR functions involved with various types of surveys.

Material Review: Emad and his team will review the attached materials with other stakeholders from the HR department.

Follow-Up: As agreed, we will follow up next week to address any additional questions and to present the Engagesoft platform to the wider team.

I met with Shaimaa Othman to discuss the possibility of using our platform for your upcoming annual employee engagement survey. Here's a summary of our discussion:

Company Overview: Your company has approximately 2,500 employees across four companies in Egypt, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Nigeria, Kenya, and the Philippines.

Engagement Survey: Your HR team plans to conduct the annual employee engagement survey on September 1, 2025. We discussed the potential of using our platform for this year’s survey, provided there's enough time to get internal approval.

Customization and Delivery: To meet your needs, we will provide multi-language support, including Urdu for your blue-collar employees in the Gulf region. The survey can be deployed through multiple channels, including email, QR codes, and a generic link. We will also provide an SMS service for blue-collar employees in Egypt and Saudi Arabia.

Reporting and Analysis: We will deliver comprehensive reports at both the group level and for each of the four individual companies. If you are unable to use our platform for the survey this year, we can still upload your results data for analysis.

Next Steps and Special Offer

As agreed, I will follow up with you next week after you've had a chance to review the attached materials and discuss them with your manager.

To secure our partnership, we're providing a special offer for your HR team:

35% Discount: You'll receive a 35% discount on the updated financial proposal for up to 2,500 employees.

Flexible Subscription Start: The subscription can begin anytime until January 2026. The final Service Level Agreement (SLA) and payment will be due in Q4 2025.

Flexible Payment Terms: We can split the payment into three installments:

October 2025: 100,000 EGP (from the 2025 budget)

December 2025: 30% of the remaining balance

January 2026: The final remaining balance

To secure this special offer, we just need your initial approval and a signed copy of the proposal by the end of August 2025.

Meeting Brief: Seoudi Supermarket
Meeting with: Mohamed Sobhi, Senior Performance Management & Employee Engagement Supervisor, Seoudi Supermarket

Date: August 31, 2025

Purpose of the Meeting

To explore how Engagesoft’s Engagement Model and Dashboard can provide actionable insights, advanced reporting, and recommendations to help Seoudi Supermarket make data-driven decisions to improve employee engagement.

Key Discussion Points

Employee Base: Seoudi Supermarket currently has approximately 6,000 employees, with plans to grow to 7,000 by 2026. Roughly 80% of the workforce consists of blue-collar employees.

Survey Accessibility: Surveys can be easily distributed via a QR code or SMS for blue-collar staff and by email for white-collar staff.

Survey Programs: Our platform can supplement your HR team's current annual surveys by running various employee experience surveys, including onboarding, exit, and other touchpoints.

Bilingual Support: The platform supports bilingual surveys, including Egyptian Arabic, to make the process easier for blue-collar employees.

Employee Analytics: You expressed strong interest in our exit analysis feature, which identifies reasons for turnover. We can also provide insights into which employees are at risk within each department and under each manager.

Data Visualization: Our heatmap features can display results based on various demographics you define, such as branch, city, location, gender, and age group, providing thorough analysis.

HRIS Integration: Our platform can seamlessly integrate with your existing HRIS, such as Microsoft Dynamics 365, to automate survey distribution based on your plan.

Next Steps

We will follow up with you after you've had a chance to discuss the provided materials with your management.

Special Proposal

To secure our partnership, we are offering the following special proposal, which requires initial approval and a signed copy of the attached proposal by September 18, 2025.

35% Discount on the financial proposal for up to 7,000 employees.

Subscription Flexibility: You can begin your subscription anytime until January 2026. The finalization of the SLA and payment will be due in Q4 2025.

I met Samy Mounir, the Group HR and Admin, has been with the company for eight months. He mentioned that before he joined, Luna—a family business—had not conducted any engagement surveys.

Samy is trying to help the company transition into a more corporate structure and is looking for a tool to measure engagement, specifically between the older and newer generations of employees. Although he's unsure if senior management will approve, he wants to present our platform to them as a potential solution.

The company has 650 employees, including both white- and blue-collar workers. Samy asked for two proposals: one focused solely on engagement, and another that combines engagement with employee experience. He plans to get back to me by the end of the month.

I met with Tahiya Al Haddabi, Assistant Manager of Learning & Development. She recently moved into this role, and employee engagement is now under her responsibility.

Her company operates in three countries: Oman, KSA, and Tanzania.

They previously conducted engagement surveys through a consultant, using the Gallup platform, every two years. They also plan to launch onboarding and exit surveys at the beginning of next year.

Tahiya requested a financial proposal only, along with our company profile, engagement model, and a sample of our detailed report. She will get back to us after a few weeks.

They currently use Oracle HRIS.

When asked about account setup time, I informed her that if all their requirements are ready, we would need only two weeks.

Orascom Hotels Management - Engagement Survey Brief
Key Stakeholders

I recently met with Rami Wilson, HR Transformation Director at Orascom Hotels Management. He is leading a project to run engagement surveys for their blue-collar employees. The final decision-makers are Hanan Moselhy (Head of Human Resources) and Mr. Joachim Schmitt (CEO).

Project Scope

Orascom Hotels Management has a workforce of 10,000 employees. The initial project focuses on 5,500 blue-collar employees located in four countries: Egypt, Oman, Montenegro, and Switzerland. They need to launch the surveys in October or November at the latest.

Technical Requirements

Rami asked for our confirmation on three key technical points:

GDPR Compliance: Since they have employees in Europe (Switzerland and Montenegro), they need to know if we are compliant with the EU's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). We need to confirm if we have experience addressing this requirement with other European clients.

QR Code Surveys: They require a solution that allows all employees to easily access and complete the survey by scanning a QR code.

Language Translation: The solution must be able to automatically translate employee comments. For example, if a comment is submitted in Dutch, it should appear in English on the HR dashboard for easy analysis.

Next Steps:
I've agreed to get the answers to these technical questions from our IT team. Once we can confirm that we meet their requirements, we will send them both a technical and financial proposal.

[Your Name] - [Your Title]

Discussion Summary

We had a productive meeting with Laila and Jessa from Nehmeh, a group of companies with approximately 170 employees, roughly 60% of whom are blue-collar workers. The HR team currently conducts in-house employee satisfaction surveys twice a year, with the next one scheduled for December 2025. They are looking for a more efficient way to collect feedback from their entire workforce, particularly their blue-collar employees, and are seeking a solution that can handle multiple languages.

Key Takeaways & Our Proposed Solution

Our discussion confirmed that our platform is well-suited to support Nehmeh's needs. Specifically, we can help them streamline their upcoming employee satisfaction survey and expand their employee experience initiatives.

Our platform offers:

Flexible Survey Access: We can provide survey links via QR codes and SMS for blue-collar workers, and by email for white-collar staff.

Multi-language Support: Our platform can accommodate the diverse nationalities within Nehmeh's workforce, ensuring all employees can complete surveys in their preferred language.

Comprehensive Survey Capabilities: We can support a full range of employee experience surveys beyond satisfaction, including onboarding and exit surveys.

AI-Powered Insights: We can provide AI-driven action plan recommendations for any areas with low scores, helping Nehmeh's management team prioritize and address key issues.

Next Steps & Special Proposal

As agreed, we will follow up after you have had a chance to discuss the attached materials with your management. To secure our partnership, we are pleased to offer a special proposal:

10% Discount on the financial proposal for your employee base of up to 170 people.

Flexible Subscription Start Date: You can begin your subscription anytime until December 31st, 2025. The final SLA and payment will be due in Q4 2025.

To secure this special offer, we just need an initial approval and a signed copy of the attached proposal by the middle of September 2025.

properties.hs_meeting_title: Online Demo Meeting With Caroline Takla

properties.hs_meeting_body:
Amr Bakr, who was joined by Mohamed and Ayah from his HR team.

Amr explained that his company did not engage with us last year due to a major transformation and restructuring phase, which prevented them from conducting any employee engagement surveys.

He shared his upcoming Employee Engagement Plan:

Phase 1 will focus on up to 800 white-collar and sales employees, with surveys planned for January 2026.

Phase 2 will include 8,200 blue-collar employees.

I provided a quote for the first phase (up to 800 employees) for an employee engagement survey. Amr requested a unit price of $8.50 with a 40% discount, bringing the total price to $4,080 (excluding 14% VAT).

We agreed that I will send him the formal financial proposal. He expects to secure final approval early next week. He confirmed the full payment will be made in January 2026, but the Service Level Agreement (SLA) will be finalized immediately after he receives the approval.

He said we are committed to working on the Great Place to Work program, and we started it about two months ago. However, I liked what you said about going and analyzing the data. I had already included this in the plan I created when I joined the company four months ago. I need to know more about the platform, and I would like to know more about the prices. HC 400

Meeting will be with naif and his team

https://www.linkedin.com/in/shahzad-ali-zahid-63374b333/

Current Situation:

They conduct culture surveys every two years, with the last one in September 2023.
They previously used an American HR consultant called R4cp.

Core Challenges (Pain Points):

They need more advanced technology outcomes and deeper insights.
They face challenges with survey languages due to diverse nationalities.
Required survey languages: English, Arabic, Urdu, Hindi, Bengali, Tagalog, Tamil, and Turkish.

Critical Timeline:

They need to run their next survey in September 2025.

Decision Process:

We will discuss these points in our second meeting next Monday, June 23rd.

Stakeholders:

I met Noura Mubarak, Culture and Engagement Manager.

Employee Size & Location:

They have more than 12,000 employees (8,000 are blue-collar workers).
The group includes 6 companies located in 7 countries.

Wadi Degla Development has 800 employees (500 without business e-mail).

Wadi Degla Holding has 6,000 employees (1,000 without business e-mail).

They are using SAP HRIS.
They did an employee satisfaction survey 5 years ago with (Job Master).
They did an employee satisfaction survey 2 years ago internally.
They are planning to run the 1st survey in April 2024.
They will get back to us with the 1st feedback end of this month.
They requested 2 price quotes:
Up to 800 employees.
Up to 6,000 employees.

The approval should be taken from HR and the IT department.

Note:
They requested a demo meeting from us because they checked with another platform and the prices were very expansive

- Marwa joined the meeting.
- he did not invite the new team member on his team who is in charge of OD and employee engagement.
- a new girl joined his team, and she will be responsible for OD and Training.
- they are in the process of choosing a new HRIS and implementing PMS software.
- he said that they need to have the implementation completed before they can review the employee engagement, which is expected to happen after one month.
- the reason is that they want to also see if the PMS covers the engagement area.
- he said that he will contact me after one month.
- I asked him how the PMS works and it turned out that each manager will evaluate their employees using this tool.
- I explain to him that this would not be a replacement for our platform, since it serves different purposes and post tools will complement each other, because with PMS, the evaluation will happen from the management side where is within Engagesoft, it will be the other way around.
- he paused, and he expressed his agreement to that.
- I told him that I will be in touch after one month to see how things are going on their end and if this is a good time to review the engagement area.

I met Abdullah and I gave him a full brief about our company.

They were planning for the engagement surveys and checked also with other vendors like (Spark Engagement).

They have 600 employees.

They are using now Zoho for HRIS.

They are planning to move to SAP or Workdays.

They want to dispatch the surveys in October.

The management want to change a lot of thing and make system for every single part.

They are doing a lot of events Abdullah liked the custom survey part.

We agreed to send him the price quote and presentation and will call him middle of June.

Me and Eyad met Khaled and ask him a couple of questions:

1- What are you currently evaluating?

They are evaluating depending on the scope of work to measure the engagement and satisfaction through 3rd part.

They are planning to do the surveys between June and July.

They are comparing platforms with each other.

Khaled asked me to follow up with him after 2 weeks to give me the final feedback.

MAIN POINTS
- Abeer is very interested in the engagement area.
- The main interest is in staying connected with employees in different locations, and in increasing the level of engagement.
- They have employees in different countries.
- 550 employees (all white-collar).
- Adrenaline HRIS.
- 49 nationalities.
- The only used languages are Arabic and English.
- They are planning to run two surveys a year.
- She liked the availability of an Action plan and consulting services (given her little knowledge about preparing a report, creating an action plan, and execution).
- They conducted an engagement
survey last December using Microsoft forms, which took a lot of effort and one month.
- They wish to launch another evaluation at the end of June (as the results of the previous survey was shared at the end of February).
- They have an Ambassador for Employee Happiness.
- The Management is very interested in engagement and employee happiness.
- They can work with foreign companies but they should have an office in Riyadh.

- She was impressed with the platform and how it shows information that used to take them a month to have in a click of a button.

NEXT STEPS
1- send presentation (E + A)
2- Abeer will present to the VP of People and Culture, and have someone from Cyber Security and someone from IT to be in the loop.
3- Abeer is to share feedback around 20 March.
3- Ask Abeer to send me an NDA so she can reveal the name of the entity and necessary information later on.

I met Ahmed and I gave him a full about our company and showed him a full demo on our dashboard.

-They have 85 employees.
-They have Oracle HRIS.

-He requested a Local benchmark in KSA for the IT industry. (we need to put extra fees to get him benchmark in the IT industry).

-I explained the experience module part.

He asked me to send him the price quote and presentation and will get back to me in the middle of next week.

MAIN POINTS
1- IT Consulting
2- UK, Egypt, KSA
3- They have an interest in evaluating the employee engagement
4- 350
5- They are looking for a survey tool and one place for surveying activities.
6- Fox HR
7- Some departments have high and unclear resignations, especially during the probation period
8- Impressed by the platform

9- The management team is considering a platform

NEXT STEPS
1- Send the docs and links.
2- Alia will discuss the platform with the HR Management team this week.
3- Alia will share feedback at the end of this week.

I met Heba, Wessam Zamzami and Abdullah from the HR Team

I gave them a full brief and full demo of our dashboard.

-The company moved from government to semi-government 1 year ago.

-Heba was using Gallup before with her previous employer.

-She was impressed by our advanced features.

-They have 1,200 employees.

-They requested SMS for 300 employees in the operation department.

-They requested that we can provide them with a benchmark in "Airline & Aviation Industry at least in the middle east. To compare themselves with other airports.

Next Steps:

1- Send price quote and presentation to Heba.

2- They will review it and their Supply Chain Manager will request from HR Team to get price quotes from other vendors to compare features with pricing regarding their budget and requirements.

Next, follow up with Heba will be at the end of this month. (Jan.)

- Sana (Talen and Development) joined the meeting.
- They are looking for a career development tracking tool.

MAIN POINTS
1- 940 employees.
2- Microsoft Dynamics
3- Nourah is aware of the engagement
4- They will need to add Hindi, Filippino, Nibali, Bangladeshi, Pakistani, and Urdu.
5- They may not prefer integration with the HRIS
6- They would like to finalize this year for kick-off in the new year.

7- Nourah liked the platform.

NEXT STEPS
1- Send documents
2- Send a quote
3- Nourah will share the info and will let me know if there will be a second meeting with the management team.

MAIN POINTS
- Met with Sari (Abu Sulaiman), Hossam, Mohammed, and Reham.
- Starting with 500 employees.
- Customization is important.
- Sari is the decision maker.
- They expressed their interest and asked me to jump to the quote.
- They have to compare 3 quotes and they already have two.
- They asked for a special rate.
- Hossam said he is impressed by the platform especially since it was developed by a Jordanian ( Arabic ) company.
- Hossam said that he liked me personally and liked my personality and that he would love to work with me personally.

- They said that it would be great to see me at their office ( said that in a funny way).

NEXT STEPS
- Send a quote and the enhanced brochure.
- Should get back to me in two weeks.

Main Points:
Bilal + Manar + Abdullah
1- Bilal is the strategist business manager AND Manar is Marketing.
2- They have been looking for an employee engagement platform.
3- They need to retain talents, they have a high rate of talent turnover due to the competition and workplace.
4- They need to be similar to foodics culture.
5- 850 employees ( 600 are blue collars)
6- Start with white-collar workers.
7- They know their issue, validate, grey areas and action plan.

8- Asked if we have a physical location in Saudi.

Next steps:
1- Send a quote for 250 employees.
2- Present to the group CFO (4-6 WEEKS)
3- Follow up after 2 weeks.

I met with Ahmed Zakaria, HR Manager, and provided a full brief on our employee engagement and experience solutions.

Company Context and Pain Points

The company is a family business currently undergoing a transformation phase. They have 700 employees, 30% of whom are blue-collar workers.

Over the last two years, they have conducted ten employee surveys, primarily using Google Forms. Ahmed highlighted two major challenges with these efforts:

Low Participation: Previous surveys suffered from low participation, primarily due to the difficulty in effectively reaching all employee segments, especially blue-collar workers.

Analysis Burden: The subsequent data analysis was extremely time-consuming for his team.

Next Steps and Commercials

The client is currently in the budgeting phase. We agreed that I will send Ahmed two price quotes (for Engagement and Experience solutions), incorporating our 25% Q4 discount. He requested that I follow up with him in one month.

Enayat.

Looking forward to meet you.

Razan Almuqrin

properties.hs_meeting_body: In the meeting it was Omar and Hoda from engagesoft side and Zaid, Ammar and Tamar from the client side. They use survey monkey to run a survey once a year (every october) they have concluded this year and currently creating the reporting, they finished the higher level analysis and now the detailed which will conclude in 2 weeks. Omar demoed all the 3 solutions and at last we agreed they will share the information and they will advise on the product of interest.

• Meeting Agenda:
    • Discuss how the Engagesoft employee engagement platform can help Right Food to:
    • Increase employee productivity.
    • Improve the work environment.
    • Attract and keep talent.
    • Enhance overall company results.

Omar and I attended the meeting with Yazan, they are facing challenges with retention and the culture and he needs help in this area, the company is old fashion and requires a major shift in mentality and leadership style. He is doing some efforts , one will be to conduct internal survey to gauge the employee trust in HR , and around Feb there will be strategy refresher session out of which the expected is to advise on running engagement surveys and so a tender will be released. They have 1200 employees out of which 8500 blue collars. He showed more interest in the leadership 360 . He will also recommend us to Nakilat,

We met during the HR Excellence Conf in Kuwait, she had left the company recently and decided to persue her own work independently
We were supposed to meet during the HR Excellence Conf in Kuwait but didn't get the chance.

We met at the HR Excellence Conf, he is well known within the market in Kuwait and was a speaker during the event; he offers softskills trainings and his main work is in Kuwait, he has extensive experience. He advised that generally companies in Kuwait consider employee enagement a good to have initative but not a core one ; however we could continue to aim and we can further discuss potentail collaboration and how we can reffer us.
We met during the HR Excellence Conf in Kuwait, they do run surveys through Glint and generally happy with it however she is open to exploring options but asked to touch base in Jan.
I tried to find him during the HR excellence Cof in Kuwait but couldn't get hold of.

We met during the HR Excellence Conf Kuwait, we had a long discussion over the programs he offers to corporate and individuals mainly to grow enterpenures with the organization that will feel more connected to the company objectives or directly to individuals who would like to invest in themselves to be able to work full time but in parellel know how to grow something in the side and reinvest part of their earnings into growing their income. We discussed different connection points of how we could collaborate one through refferal or another where he buy number of seats and use to survey his clients, either way we agreed to touch based mid December as he is traveling and I will include Omar in next meeting.

This is an old contact I knew from when I was at Bayt and we worked together since they offered training solutions, they are well established in UAE. We have reconnected by chance during the event in Kuwait (HR excellence conf) as he was an exbhitor there, we agreed to meet in person when our schedules allow to further explore potential collaborations.
Introduction Meeting HC 1200

We met during the HR Excellence Cof in Kuwait , she was transparent that Al Mana are not into employee engagement surveys and that's not of any priority to them, however; a subsediary under them Hermes Dubai which is now managed by the HQ in France is likely interested so she will introduce me to the team there

We met through an introduction ( Ramy) at the HR excellence conf Kuwait, she was interested in the 360 leadership specifically but for pricing she found it to be slightly expensive considering to market , we agreed to further discuss what we do and conduct a demo so they can see how our services could complement one another specially for their office in Dubai.

<<يرجى ملاحظة أن الدعوة في التقويم تظهر لمدة ساعتين بينما الاجتماع مخطط أن يستمر لمدة ساعة واحدة فقط وقد يمتد قليلًا في حال وجود أسئلة أو نقاش إضافي من الجانبين>>

السلام عليكم

خلال الاجتماع سنتحدث باختصار لفهم أولوياتكم الحالية في مجال تجربة ومشاركة الموظفين

- سنعرض كيف يمكن لمنصة Engagesoft دعم أهدافكم
- سيكون هناك عرض مباشر للمنصة يوضح المزايا الأكثر أهمية لفريقكم
- كما سنخصص وقتًا للأسئلة والإجابات لمناقشة أي حالات أو استفسارات خاصة
- وفي نهاية الاجتماع سنتفق على الخطوات التالية في حال كانت المنصة مناسبة لاحتياجاتكم

مع أطيب التحيات

We met during the HR event in Kuwait, he mentioned that they have been using a company for surveys for past 4 years which is Willis Towers Watson, first time in 2023 thee ran the "your voice matters" employee engagement survey . They are happy with the service and is not willing to change to another provider additionally becuase of the historical data.

I met them both during the HR Excellence Conf in Kuwait, Suad Ibrahim is mainly the one handling engagement, they are running surveys using Glint by microsoft and generally they have good experience except the fact that she cant reach anyone human when needing assistance which can be frustrating at times and also their servers are in US while they prefer to deal with providers with local hosting or in EU. We agreed to arrange another meeting online to showcase the solutions as they do have interest.

We met by chance at the HR Excellence Conf, we used to work together at Bayt. He manages as Head of growth the market in KSA, Australia and other regions and he mentioned that Mercer do have basic employee engagement survey module but they are not planning to develop it further so they could be open to collaboration.

Agenda:

  • Welcome & Introductions

  • Brief Introduction to Engagesoft

  • Understanding Your Business & Potential collaboration 

  • Demo Overview (Employee Engagement, EX & Leadership 360)

  • Q&A & Next Steps

We met during the HR excellence conference in Kuwait, he mentioned that they don't have an OD department or something dedicated for employees wellbeing/engagement and that's something he wishes to change, they do run surveys twice a year through McKinsey for past 14 years , he is aware of Engagesoft but interested to have a refresher demo specially that we launched the leadership 3060

We met during the HR Excellence Conf in Kuwait, Nada mentioned that they use Great place to work for surveys and not sure if they have plans to change, the DM is Ahmad Rajab, we just exchanged a quick hi and didn't get the chance to talk so I emailed Nada post the event and asked her to connect us.
I treid to meet him during the HR Excellence Conf Kuwait as agreed but I couldn't get hold of him.

We met during the HR Excellence Conf in Kuwait and we had a long discussion about what we offer and even did a full demo on all the 3 solutions we have. He is working as inpdenent consultant at the moment and have clients in several GCC countries and aborad, he showed great interest in understanding our soultions and methodology to see how he can incorporate this in his offerings. He mentioned two portals he worked with one in Armenia it was a reward portal but with engagement within and the cost was 1$ per user and another one International that he couldn't remember the name of. We agreed to meet in Dubai as he is based here to continue our conversation.

Dear ,

It was a pleasure speaking with you.

- A brief conversation to understand your current employee engagement and experience priorities

- A focused walkthrough of how Engagesoft can support your goals

- A live demo of the platform, highlighting features that matter most to your team

Dear Karim,

I hope you, Heba, and Roland are doing well.

Following up on your previous request, we are pleased to provide our attached updated Technical and Financial Proposals for the following two services:

  1.  Leadership 360 Competency Assessment (100 Leaders) - The cost for additional leader seats beyond the 100 leaders is mentioned in the attached  financial proposal.
  2.  Employee Engagement Platform (up to 9,000 Employees, covering 70% White Collar and 30% Blue Collar staff)

Key Commercial Terms

Support and Maintenance are included in the price for both products.

The annual renewal cost, including support fees, will be the prior year's discounted price plus a standard 10% annual increase for both products. (This is detailed further in the attached Financial Proposal.)

Attached Documents

For more details about the Engagesoft Employee Engagement Platform, I've attached the "Engagesoft Company Features" PDF presentation (including screenshots and descriptions). This document is for the Wadi Degla Holding HR Team to review until we can meet and demonstrate all our features for you all.

If you have any concerns—whether budget-related, solution-specific, or regarding your unique requirements—please don't hesitate to share your feedback. We are happy to collaborate and work through them together.

I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Warm regards,

Marwa Amin

From: Marwa Amin <marwa.amin@engagesoft.me<mailto:marwa.amin@engagesoft.me>>
Sent: Tuesday, December 2, 2025 12:07 PM
To: Ahmed Mohamed Abd El Aziz Sherif <a.sherif@gb-corporation.com<mailto:a.sherif@gb-corporation.com>>
Cc: Mario Hany Albert <mario.albert@gb-corporation.com<mailto:mario.albert@gb-corporation.com>>; Ingy Tarek Mosaad Abd El Rahman <ingy.tarek@gb-corporation.com<mailto:ingy.tarek@gb-corporation.com>>; George Sedky <george.sedky@gb-corporation.com<mailto:george.sedky@gb-corporation.com>>; Omar Tahboub <omar@engagesoft.me<mailto:omar@engagesoft.me>>
Subject: Re: Exclusive Offer | Celebrating Engagesoft's $3.5M Raise With GB Corp

Dear Ahmed,
I hope this email finds you all well.
I’m writing to share some exciting news from Engagesoft. Our AI-powered platform for employee engagement and organizational effectiveness has just successfully raised a $3.5 million Pre-Series A funding round led by Silicon Badia<https://l.shortlink.es/l/abbfbff4d78d23e0ff1535aa40833d7ed8ee8bb6?u=8906872>.
For your reference, you can watch our CEO and Co-founder, Omar <https://l.shortlink.es/l/4932d46db039f8a98c173f007a4140124684f5e6?u=8906872> Tahboub<https://l.shortlink.es/l/122aa9d6582995126255cb76804a9153d604063d?u=8906872>'s, television interview here: https://asharq.co/2rbnu<https://l.shortlink.es/l/08f9cb69624c4dcfd81e87ab3440d478508f43d7?u=8906872>
Following an ongoing initiative by our company's investors—aimed at encouraging functional integration and market entry for our platform within the Egyptian market—we are delighted to share a mega discount offer to GB Corp.
We are incredibly keen to have GB Corp as one of our valued anchor clients in Egypt, and this exclusive, attached offer reflects that commitment.
📅Key Offer Dates and Flexibility
To help GB Corp's HR Team with their internal approvals, we have structured the offer timeline with built-in flexibility:
•        Offer Deadline for Initial Approval: This special offer is valid until December 15th, 2025, requiring only a written initial approval by this date.
•        Finalization & Payment Window: We are happy to offer the flexibility to finalize the contract and settle the payment during Q1 2026 (January 1 to March 31, 2026).
•        Subscription Start Date: The subscription can be activated anytime within that quarter (Q1 2026).
📎Attachments

Dear Team,

This meeting is to align between our HRIS team and the Engagesoft technical team on the resignation integration process, given the importance and complexity of this topic. The goal is to ensure clarity before moving forward to testing and implementation.

Discussion points:


  *
Review the current integration flow step by step
  *
Clarify how and when the resignation date is populated
  *
Confirm data availability through the API
  *
Align on trigger logic and test scenario readiness
  *
Confirm technical and business requirements to proceed

We look forward to meeting with you and aligning on the next steps.

Best regards,

You are invited to attend the meeting to discuss the employee survey evaluation with our Engagesoft service provider. The session will focus on reviewing the findings, sharing perspectives, and aligning on actions moving forward.

Respectfully yours,

Meeting Agenda: 

Optimizing Employee Experience with Engagesoft

  • Strategic Goals for AAMBFS: Exploring how the Engagesoft platform aligns with key organizational objectives:

• Currently using Bayzat for Employee Engagement; perceives similar feature set.

  • Key interest: regional engagement benchmarks, specifically F&B industry.

  • Bayzat offering free pilot of 360 Leadership (product still in launch phase).

  • Relationship with Bayzat: ~4 years.

  • Open to evaluating our Engagement platform if it:

    • Is more aesthetic & user-friendly

    • Offers industry benchmarks

    • Is cost-effective

  • Timing: prefers to continue engagement discussion post Eid.

  • Open to intro to F&B division to explore Experience module.

  • Current CX tool: SurveyMonkey.

  • Next meeting agreed post Eid.

Met with Rami from AlMana:

  • He is the HR director working 5 years at Al Manaa

  • They want to implement Engagement, Experience and Leadership Assessments as part of their plan for this year

  • They are interested in modern solutions

  • Past, they have been doing it manually and old school

  • He loved the platform and the solutions and found the session extremely useful, and the solution very powerful

  • He will discuss with the MD by Sunday or Monday and get back to me

  • Will also send commercial Proposal

  • Headcount is between 1,500 to 3,000 depending on what stage they decide to start with

On Thu, Sep 11, 2025 at 6:07 PM Sinan Alamarneh <sinan.amarneh@engagesoft.me<mailto:sinan.amarneh@engagesoft.me>> wrote:
Dear Ibrahim,

Please find attached the “We Hear You” Employee Engagement Survey Analysis Report.

This report is designed to provide a view of how employees across Zamil Industrial are experiencing their workplace. It highlights overall engagement levels, loyalty and retention indicators, and the key drivers influencing engagement. It also offers insights into employee comments, comparisons across companies and business units, and deep dives into lower-scoring areas to guide focused action.

The report is structured as follows:

  *   Executive Summary – key outcomes, strengths, and challenges
  *   Methodology & Participation Insights – survey scope, reach, and demographics
  *   Engagement Outcomes – overall engagement, eNPS, and retention likelihood
  *   Engagement Drivers – strengths and challenges across job, organizational, and recognition aspects
  *   Employee Comments Analysis – main themes, positive and negative
  *   Segmented Analysis – results across companies, business units, geographies, and demographics
  *   Suggested Action Plans – recommendations to celebrate strengths and address challenges

We look forward to your feedback and any comments you may have.

Best Regards

Sinan Al-Amarneh
Customer Success Manager

properties.hs_meeting_body: She is someone I know who owns a Finish company and is based in Sweden, they have a platform that offers leadership programs split into 3 parts, self awareness, self resilience and self leadership, their main market in Japan and there is interest for leadership assessments, I showed her the demo and she liked it and could see potential in integrating and vice versa we could recommend them to our clients, we agreed that I will confirm with our CTO if we can provide the leadership 360 interface in Japanese and along with reporting then will meet again to discuss next steps.

Dear EngageSoft Team,
I hope you are doing well.
We are currently assessing specialized service providers for an employee engagement and satisfaction survey project for one of our clients in Qatar. The project covers approximately 350 employees and requires a professional survey methodology, secure data collection, analysis, reporting, and practical recommendations.
We would appreciate it if you could share more information about your employee engagement survey services, including:

  1.
Your company profile or service presentation.
  2.
Available survey packages, including one-time survey options and annual employee listening programs.
  3.
Scope of services, including survey design, platform access, project management, participation tracking, analysis, reporting, and action planning.
  4.
Sample report, dashboard, or anonymized output showing the type of deliverables provided.
  5.
Expected timeline for a project covering approximately 350 employees.
  6.
Commercial proposal or indicative pricing.
  7.
Data privacy, confidentiality, and employee anonymity approach.
  8.
Relevant experience with organizations in the Middle East, especially education, public sector, or institutional clients.

The client is looking for a provider with proven experience in employee surveys and practical reporting that can support decision-making and workplace improvement.
Kindly share the relevant materials and let us know if we can schedule a short call to discuss the project requirements.
Summary Scope of Work
The project is focused on designing and implementing an employee experience and satisfaction study for approximately 350 employees across academic and administrative functions. The objective is to measure overall employee satisfaction, understand the employee experience, assess engagement levels, identify strengths and improvement opportunities, and provide practical recommendations to support better decision-making and institutional performance.
The scope includes developing a complete measurement framework, designing a professional survey, defining relevant dimensions such as leadership, work environment, communication, and related factors, and ensuring that the survey uses clear and balanced questions without creating participant fatigue. It also requires careful design of demographic questions to protect employee privacy and avoid identifying participants.
The selected provider is expected to manage the survey launch, distribution, reminders, participation tracking, and data collection process while maintaining confidentiality. The work also includes quantitative analysis, qualitative analysis of open-ended responses, extraction of key indicators, identification of main strengths and challenges, and development of practical recommendations linked to responsible parties, timelines, and performance indicators.
The final deliverables should include a detailed report, professional charts and visualizations, an executive summary for senior management, an action plan matrix linking findings to recommendations, and one knowledge-transfer workshop for the client team. The total project duration should not exceed three months from approval.
Best Regards,
